title: MIP SCIM Role (Group Extension)
description: MIP extension attributes for SCIM 2.0 Group resources representing roles. Schema URI: urn:mip:scim:schemas:extension:Organization:2.0:Role

items.description: Permission string from the MIP permission catalog (e.g., credentials:issue, flows:read, trust:admin). These map to Cedar action entity IDs in the MIP namespace.

permissions.description: Permission strings granted by this role. Each string corresponds to a Cedar Action entity (e.g., MIP::Action::"credentials:issue").

policy_set_id.description: Reference to a PolicySet (policy_type=ACCESS_CONTROL) containing Cedar policies that define fine-grained access rules for this role. When set, Cedar policies are evaluated in addition to the permissions array — Cedar forbid policies can restrict access, and Cedar permit policies with conditions can enable attribute-based access control beyond simple RBAC.

is_system_role.description: System-defined roles are read-only and cannot be modified or deleted

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose
